## Tipo de cambio

- [ ] Feature nueva
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Documentacion
- [ ] Configuracion/Infra

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pasan (`make test`)
- [ ] Sin errores de lint (`ruff check apps/api/`)
- [ ] Frontend compila (`cd apps/web && npm run build`)
- [ ] Documentacion actualizada si aplica
